results.pred_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_users FROM identity.users

SELECT COUNT(*) AS active_product_count
FROM catalog.products
WHERE status = 'active' AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT code FROM geo.currencies

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT billing.payments.order_id) AS refunded_orders_count
FROM billing.payments
WHERE billing.payments.amount_refunded > 0

SELECT AVG(grand_total) AS average_grand_total
FROM sales.orders

SELECT COUNT(*) AS urgent_tickets_count
FROM support.tickets
WHERE priority = 'urgent'
SELECT DISTINCT status FROM sales.orders

SELECT SUM(amount) AS total_captured_amount
FROM billing.payments
WHERE status = 'captured'

SELECT COUNT(*) AS archived_product_count
FROM catalog.products
WHERE deleted_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) AS active_subscriptions_count
FROM billing.subscriptions
WHERE status = 'active'

SELECT COUNT(*) AS european_country_count
FROM geo.countries
WHERE continent = 'Europe'

SELECT AVG(employee_count) AS average_employee_count
FROM crm.accounts
WHERE employee_count IS NOT NULL
SELECT 'insufficient schema: missing sign-up information' AS error

SELECT COUNT(*) AS open_tickets_count
FROM support.tickets
WHERE status != 'closed'

FROM billing.invoices
WHERE status = 'overdue'

results.pred_sql:
SELECT 
  catalog.products.name AS product_name,
  catalog.brands.name AS brand_name
FROM 
  catalog.products
LEFT JOIN 
  catalog.brands ON catalog.products.brand_id = catalog.brands.id

SELECT 
    catalog.product_reviews.id AS review_id,
    catalog.product_reviews.title AS review_title,
    catalog.product_reviews.body AS review_body,
    catalog.product_reviews.rating AS review_rating,
    catalog.products.name AS product_name
FROM 
    catalog.product_reviews
JOIN 
    catalog.products ON catalog.product_reviews.product_id = catalog.products.id

SELECT 
  billing.subscriptions.id AS subscription_id,
  billing.plans.name AS plan_name
FROM 
  billing.subscriptions
JOIN 
  billing.plans ON billing.subscriptions.plan_id = billing.plans.id

SELECT 
  orders.id AS order_id,
  orders.order_number,
  users.email AS user_email
FROM 
  sales.orders
JOIN 
  identity.users ON orders.user_id = users.id

SELECT p.id, p.public_id, p.name
FROM catalog.products p
LEFT JOIN catalog.product_reviews pr ON p.id = pr.product_id
WHERE pr.id IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT subscriptions.user_id) AS active_subscribers
FROM billing.subscriptions
JOIN billing.plans ON subscriptions.plan_id = plans.id
WHERE subscriptions.status = 'active' AND plans.code = 'pro'

SELECT
  o.currency_code,
  SUM(o.grand_total) AS total_revenue
FROM
  sales.orders o
GROUP BY
  o.currency_code

SELECT
    o.tenant_id,
    COUNT(o.id) AS order_count
FROM
    sales.orders o
GROUP BY
    o.tenant_id

SELECT p.id, p.name, AVG(pr.rating) AS average_rating
FROM catalog.products p
JOIN catalog.product_reviews pr ON p.id = pr.product_id
WHERE pr.is_approved = TRUE
GROUP BY p.id, p.name
HAVING AVG(pr.rating) > 4

SELECT u.id, u.public_id, u.email, u.full_name, COUNT(o.id) AS order_count
FROM identity.users u
JOIN sales.orders o ON u.id = o.user_id
GROUP BY u.id, u.public_id, u.email, u.full_name
HAVING COUNT(o.id) > 3

SELECT
    countries.name AS country_name,
    SUM(orders.grand_total) AS total_revenue
FROM
    sales.orders
JOIN
    geo.addresses ON orders.shipping_address_id = addresses.id
JOIN
    geo.countries ON addresses.country_id = countries.id
GROUP BY
    countries.name
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC

SELECT p.name, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_units_sold
FROM sales.order_items oi
JOIN catalog.product_variants pv ON oi.product_variant_id = pv.id
JOIN catalog.products p ON pv.product_id = p.id
GROUP BY p.id, p.name
ORDER BY total_units_sold DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT DISTINCT u.email
FROM billing.payment_refunds pr
JOIN billing.payments p ON pr.payment_id = p.id
JOIN identity.users u ON p.tenant_id = u.tenant_id
WHERE pr.status IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.user_id) AS user_count
FROM geo.addresses a
JOIN geo.countries c ON a.country_id = c.id
WHERE c.name = 'Germany' AND a.user_id IS NOT NULL

SELECT
  p.code AS plan_code,
  COUNT(s.id) AS active_subscriptions_count
FROM
  billing.subscriptions s
JOIN
  billing.plans p ON s.plan_id = p.id
WHERE
  s.status = 'active'
GROUP BY
  p.code

SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('month', placed_at) AS month,
  COUNT(*) AS order_count
FROM
  sales.orders
WHERE
  placed_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '12 months'
GROUP BY
  month
ORDER BY
  month

SELECT 
    t.id AS tenant_id,
    t.name AS tenant_name,
    SUM(o.grand_total) AS total_order_revenue
FROM 
    identity.tenants t
JOIN 
    sales.orders o ON t.id = o.tenant_id
GROUP BY 
    t.id, t.name
ORDER BY 
    total_order_revenue DESC

SELECT 
    AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (resolved_at - created_at)) / 86400) AS average_days_to_resolve
FROM 
    support.tickets
WHERE 
    resolved_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) AS order_count
FROM sales.orders o
JOIN identity.users u ON o.user_id = u.id
WHERE o.tenant_id = u.tenant_id

SELECT c.name, COUNT(pc.product_id) AS product_count
FROM catalog.categories c
JOIN catalog.product_categories pc ON c.id = pc.category_id
GROUP BY c.id, c.name
ORDER BY product_count DESC
LIMIT 3

SELECT 
    COALESCE(SUM(o.grand_total), 0) AS total_revenue_eur
FROM 
    sales.orders o
WHERE 
    o.currency_code = 'EUR'
    AND o.placed_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'cancelled' THEN 1 END)::decimal / COUNT(*)) AS cancelled_fraction
FROM 
    sales.orders

SELECT id, name, legal_name, domain, industry, employee_count, annual_revenue, currency_code, owner_user_id, phone, website, is_active, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at
FROM crm.accounts
WHERE employee_count > 100

SELECT 
    bp.name AS plan_name,
    AVG(o.grand_total) AS average_order_value
FROM 
    billing.subscriptions s
JOIN 
    billing.plans bp ON s.plan_id = bp.id
JOIN 
    sales.orders o ON s.user_id = o.user_id AND s.tenant_id = o.tenant_id
GROUP BY 
    bp.name

SELECT 
    invoices.status, 
    COUNT(invoices.id) AS paid_invoices_count
FROM 
    billing.invoices
WHERE 
    invoices.paid_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 
    invoices.status
